project: AI舌诊系统重构 - uni-app + PostgreSQL
description: Refactor AI Tongue Diagnosis System with uni-app frontend (Vue 3), PostgreSQL database, SQLAlchemy ORM, and JWT authentication

userStories.title: Create database migration config
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to set up Alembic database migration tool.

userStories.title: Create users table migration
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create the users table migration.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration file contains complete users table structure
UUID primary key, all field types correct

userStories.title: Create refresh_tokens table migration
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create the refresh_tokens table migration.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration file contains complete refresh_tokens table structure

userStories.title: Create tongue_images table migration
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create the tongue_images table migration.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration file contains complete tongue_images table structure

userStories.title: Create diagnosis_history table migration
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create the diagnosis_history table migration.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration file contains complete diagnosis_history table structure
Foreign keys to users and tongue_images tables

userStories.title: Create health_records table migration
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create the health_records table migration.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration file contains complete health_records table structure

userStories.title: Create database.py configuration
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create SQLAlchemy database configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: Create engine with connection pool configuration

userStories.title: Create User ORM model
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create the User SQLAlchemy model.
acceptanceCriteria: Define User model inheriting from Base
All fields match database table structure

userStories.title: Create other ORM models
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create RefreshToken, TongueImage, DiagnosisHistory, HealthRecord models.
acceptanceCriteria: Define RefreshToken model with User relationship
Define TongueImage model with User relationship
Define DiagnosisHistory model with User and TongueImage relationships
Define HealthRecord model with User relationship

userStories.title: Create security.py utilities
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create JWT and password handling utilities.

userStories.title: Create auth.py business logic
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create authentication business logic functions.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement create_user() for new user registration

userStories.title: Create deps.py dependency injection
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create FastAPI dependency injection for authentication.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement get_current_user() to get user from JWT
Implement get_optional_user() for optional auth (anonymous support)

userStories.title: Implement POST /api/v2/auth/register
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create user registration API endpoint.

userStories.title: Implement POST /api/v2/auth/login
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create user login API endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate access_token (30 min) and refresh_token (7 days)

userStories.title: Implement POST /api/v2/auth/refresh
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create refresh token API endpoint.

userStories.title: Implement POST /api/v2/auth/logout
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create user logout API endpoint.

userStories.title: Create auth Pydantic models
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create authentication-related Pydantic models.
acceptanceCriteria: Add UserRegister model (phone, password, nickname) to models.py

userStories.title: Integrate database into main.py
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to integrate database initialization into FastAPI startup.
acceptanceCriteria: Add startup event to initialize database
Add /v2/health endpoint to check database status

userStories.title: Add PostgreSQL to docker-compose
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to add PostgreSQL service to docker-compose.yml.
acceptanceCriteria: Update api service to depend on postgres

userStories.title: Create database health check
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to implement database connection health check.
acceptanceCriteria: Execute simple query to test connection
Return health status and connection info

userStories.title: Modify diagnosis API to support user_id
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to modify diagnosis API to associate with user ID.
acceptanceCriteria: Store diagnosis to diagnosis_history table after completion

userStories.title: Implement diagnosis history storage
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to persist diagnosis results to database.
acceptanceCriteria: Store all diagnosis data (user_info, features, results)
Store inference time and model info

userStories.title: Implement GET /api/v2/history/diagnoses
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create diagnosis history query API endpoint.

userStories.title: Implement GET /api/v2/history/statistics
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create health statistics API endpoint.

userStories.title: Implement GET /api/v2/history/trends
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create health trends API endpoint.

userStories.title: Implement GET /api/v2/diagnosis/{id}
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create single diagnosis detail API endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify diagnosis belongs to current user

userStories.title: Implement POST /api/v2/diagnosis/{id}/feedback
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create diagnosis feedback API endpoint.

userStories.title: Create health records API
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create health records management API endpoints.

userStories.title: Implement user management API
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create user info management API endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/v2/users/me to get current user info

userStories.title: Implement avatar upload
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create user avatar upload API endpoint.

userStories.title: Implement anonymous diagnosis compatibility
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to support anonymous user diagnosis (without login).
acceptanceCriteria: user_id is NULL for anonymous diagnosis

userStories.title: Create diagnosis history Pydantic models
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create diagnosis history related Pydantic models.

userStories.title: Create health records Pydantic models
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create health records related Pydantic models.

userStories.title: Create user Pydantic models
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to create user related Pydantic models.

userStories.title: Add database indexes for query optimization
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I need to add composite indexes for common queries.
acceptanceCriteria: Add composite index (user_id, created_at DESC) on diagnosis_history
Add composite index (user_id, record_type) on health_records
